prompt: Continuation of previous scene. A young man with short curly black hair, deep dark eyes, wearing a dark blue mandarin-collar Chinese jacket sits at the tea table. He leans closer to the book, reading intently. Warm golden afternoon light, bamboo visible outside window. Genshin Impact 3D anime style, cinematic, detailed interior. No subtitles, no text overlay, no slow motion.
